case_title: ROY S. OKUNO VS. MYLES WASHINGTON et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,352.08 FILED BY OKUNO, ROY S. AS TO DEFENDANT WASHINGTON, MYLES WASHINGTON, BERNARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-29-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-07-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WASHINGTON, BERNARD
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT WASHINGTON, MYLES WASHINGTON, BERNARD
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-03-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-29-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-29-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY ALL PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-07-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WASHINGTON, MYLES
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-29-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OKUNO, ROY S. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WASHINGTON, MYLES WASHINGTON, BERNARD $1,645.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,755.00, BERNARD WASHIBGTON, AS GUARDIAN AND NATURAL PARENT OF MYLES WASHINGTON SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF. THE COURT DETERMINES THAT PLAINTIFF'S CAR IS A TOTAL LOSS, AND AWARDS DAMAGES BASED ON ITS VALUE, LESS SALVAGE, STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
